ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "ordinal_position" INTEGER /* Ordinal position of the data entry */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths */,
  "new_cases_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of new cases */,
  "new_deaths_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of new deaths */,
  "positive_tests_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "critical_cases" INTEGER /* Number of critical cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data ratio */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the data ratio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data ratio */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data entry */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases on the date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths on the date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases on the date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date of the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
